content:
Character: Jasper Whitfield
Perception: He's the most visually composed person in the building — tall, neat, grey eyes like polished stone. Everything about him suggests precision: the watch, the posture, the way he sits with his espresso at exactly the same table every morning. I sketched him once from across the coffee shop — his jawline is architecturally satisfying. We talked briefly on the rooftop and he surprised me by knowing nothing about art but asking the right questions. I sense something fractured underneath the polish. He probably thinks I'm another struggling artist. I think he's someone who built a perfect exterior around an unfinished interior.
summary:

Everything about him suggests precision: the watch, the posture, the way he sits with his espresso at exactly the same table every morning. We talked briefly on the rooftop and he surprised me by knowing nothing about art but asking the right questions. I sense something fractured underneath the polish. He probably thinks I'm another struggling artist. I think he's someone who built a perfect exterior around an unfinished interior.
